## Associated Tutorial

This workflows is part of the tutorial [Proteogenomics 1: Database Creation](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/topics/proteomics/tutorials/proteogenomics-dbcreation/tutorial.html), available in the [GTN](https://training.galaxyproject.org)

## Features

* Includes a [Galaxy Workflow Report](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/faqs/galaxy/workflows_report_view.html)
